# Story 1.4: Home, Unified Input, and Inspiration Library

Status: done

<!-- Generated by BMAD 6.8 create-story workflow on 2026-06-19. -->

## Story

As a traveler,
I want one home surface for planning input and inspiration browsing,
so that I can move from collected inspirations into planning quickly.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Given the authenticated user opens Home, when city-grouped inspirations exist, then destination cards and a Library tab show city aggregation from that user's saved inspirations.
2. Given the user enters text or a link, when the input can be classified, then Xiaohongshu links route to canonical ingest and natural-language trip text routes to trip-parameter parsing for the Planner Picker handoff.
3. Given the input cannot be classified, when the user submits it, then a bottom half-height sheet asks the user to choose link ingest or trip planning without covering the destination cards or Library context.
4. Given an inspiration is pending location, when the user taps it, then Top-5 candidates show name and address only, with no confidence, score, distance, duration, rating, or internal ranking metadata exposed to the UI.
5. Given the user selects inspirations, when they start planning, then selected items flow into the Picker handoff as contextual anchors with `item_id`, optional `poi_id`, and source context.
6. Given new Home/Library contracts are introduced, when implementation is complete, then `docs/api/openapi.yaml` remains the API source of truth and `packages/types/src/api-types.ts` is regenerated rather than hand-edited.
7. Given the Home and Library UI emits analytics, when events are tracked, then payloads use semantic ids and do not include raw Xiaohongshu URLs, cookies, phone numbers, OTPs, candidate confidence, scores, or other private/internal fields.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Align Home and Library API contracts (AC: 1, 2, 4, 5, 6)
  - [x] Add OpenAPI schemas for `HomeInputParseRequest`, `HomeInputParseResponse`, `LibraryCitySummary`, `LibraryInspirationItem`, `LibraryCandidate`, and `PlannerHandoff`.
  - [x] Add authenticated routes for `POST /home/input/parse`, `GET /library/cities`, `GET /library/inspirations`, and `GET /library/inspirations/{inspiration_id}/candidates`.
  - [x] Keep `POST /home/input/parse` deterministic for this story: classify XHS link, trip parameters, or unknown; do not add an LLM dependency.
  - [x] Ensure Library routes scope all reads to `req.user!.id` and return 401 through existing `authGuard` when unauthenticated.
  - [x] Return pending-location candidate DTOs with only `candidate_id`, `name`, and `address`; never expose confidence, score, distance, duration, rating, or internal rank fields.
  - [x] Run `pnpm -F nomad-types run generate` after OpenAPI edits.
- [x] Build server-side Home/Library route modules without duplicating ingest storage (AC: 1, 2, 4, 6)
  - [x] Add focused modules under `apps/server/src/routes/` and/or `apps/server/src/library/` rather than growing `apps/server/src/index.ts`.
  - [x] Reuse Prisma models already present: `City`, `Inspiration`, `Asset`, `CanonicalPOI`, and `LocateCandidate`.
  - [x] Extend the Story 1.3 ingest store with read helpers or shared query helpers if no-DB local probes need in-memory Library data; keep this scoped and test-only/deterministic.
  - [x] City aggregation must count only saved inspirations visible to the authenticated user and should treat unresolved/pending city as a separate empty-state bucket rather than inventing a city.
  - [x] Library inspiration DTOs should include enough UI data for cards/list rows: id, title/text summary, locate status, city id/name when known, optional poi id/name/address, asset count or safe thumbnail reference, and created timestamp.
  - [x] Use existing standard error envelopes via `reply.sendError` for invalid parse input, missing inspiration, and unavailable user-owned records.
- [x] Implement mobile Home shell and state handoff (AC: 1, 2, 3, 5, 7)
  - [x] Update `apps/mobile/src/App.tsx` so authenticated users transition from `LoginScreen` to Home; do not fake authentication before `/me` succeeds.
  - [x] Add a Home feature folder such as `apps/mobile/src/home/` with API client, view-model helpers, Home screen, and focused tests.
  - [x] Use the existing mobile Web stack: React 19.2.7, Vite 8.0.16, Vitest 4.1.9, Testing Library 16.3.2; do not add new dependencies unless a task becomes impossible without user approval.
  - [x] Render a compact mobile Home with header segmented control `计划 | 灵感`, destination cards, Library list, selected basket, and a bottom UnifiedInput.
  - [x] Keep touch targets >=44px, transitions in the 120-200ms range, 8px-or-less card radius, stable dimensions for destination cards, and no nested card-in-card layouts.
  - [x] When `POST /home/input/parse` returns `xhs_link`, call canonical `POST /ingest/xhs` through the shared API client pattern and surface the Story 1.3 multi-link warning copy when present.
  - [x] When parse returns `trip_params`, create a Picker handoff route/state matching `/planner/pick?city={CITY}&start={YYYY-MM-DD?}&days={N?}&source=home_input` and include selected anchors in local handoff state.
  - [x] When parse returns `unknown`, show a half-height bottom sheet with two choices and preserve the user's original text.
  - [x] Add privacy-safe analytics through the existing analytics wrapper pattern; do not scatter provider-specific calls in components.
- [x] Implement Library browsing, pending-location candidate display, and selection (AC: 1, 4, 5)
  - [x] Fetch `GET /library/cities` for destination cards and city chips; show an empty state when no inspirations exist.
  - [x] Fetch `GET /library/inspirations` for the active city/filter and render sections for saved and pending-location items.
  - [x] Selecting inspiration rows toggles a stable selected basket and keeps card/list state consistent.
  - [x] Pending-location rows open a bottom sheet/modal that fetches Top-5 candidates and displays only name/address.
  - [x] The candidate view must not render labels or hidden text for confidence, score, distance, duration, rating, or rank.
  - [x] Starting planning from a destination card uses `source=home_card` and the card's city; starting from input uses `source=home_input`.
  - [x] Do not implement the full Story 2.0 Picker map, skeleton generation, or `/plan/generate` flow here; stop at a typed handoff/placeholder surface.
- [x] Add focused automated coverage and probes (AC: 1-7)
  - [x] Add server probe or tests for Home parse classification: XHS link, multi-link first-link behavior, natural-language trip params, and unknown fallback.
  - [x] Add server probe or tests for Library city aggregation, authenticated scoping, pending candidate sanitization, and missing inspiration errors.
  - [x] Add mobile tests for destination cards, Library tab, parse-to-ingest routing, parse-to-planner handoff, unknown bottom sheet, pending-location candidate display, selected basket, and PII-safe analytics.
  - [x] Ensure tests fail before implementation during the red phase, then pass after implementation.
  - [x] Run `pnpm -F nomad-mobile test`, `pnpm -F nomad-mobile build`, `pnpm -F nomad-server exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit`, `pnpm -F nomad-types run generate`, `pnpm ci:auth`, `pnpm -F nomad-server run test:ingest`, and `pnpm -r build`.

- [x] [Review][Patch] Avoid silently selecting a city when text mentions multiple cities [apps/server/src/routes/home.ts]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Reject invalid Library query filters before store access [apps/server/src/routes/library.ts]

- [x] [Review][Patch] Restrict candidate lookup to pending-location inspirations [apps/server/src/ingest/store.ts]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Do not mask database city lookup failures as unknown city data [apps/server/src/ingest/store.ts]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Bound Library inspiration reads [apps/server/src/ingest/store.ts]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Restore an existing cookie session before showing login [apps/mobile/src/App.tsx]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Prevent out-of-order candidate responses from rendering under the wrong sheet [apps/mobile/src/home/HomeScreen.tsx]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Prevent the fixed Home footer textarea from covering content after manual resize [apps/mobile/src/styles.css]

## Dev Notes

### Current State

- `apps/mobile/src/App.tsx` currently renders `LoginScreen` only. Story 1.4 should introduce the authenticated Home surface behind the existing `onAuthenticated` callback instead of bypassing Story 1.2 auth.
- `apps/mobile/src/auth/api.ts` already provides the browser API pattern: `VITE_API_BASE_URL` fallback, `credentials: "include"`, JSON parsing, standard error normalization, and generated OpenAPI types from `nomad-types`.
- `apps/mobile/src/auth/analytics.ts` is the existing privacy-safe analytics wrapper. Extend or mirror this pattern for Home events.
- Story 1.3 added canonical ingest routes: `POST /ingest/xhs` and `GET /ingest/{job_id}/events`, with deprecated aliases preserved. Story 1.4 should consume the canonical ingest path and not create another ingest stack.
- Story 1.3 persists inspirations through `IngestJob`, `Inspiration`, `Asset`, `CanonicalPOI`, `City`, and `LocateCandidate`; these are the Library source of truth.
- The server currently has no Home input parser route and no Library routes. `/plan/generate` exists as an ACK placeholder, but full Picker and skeleton behavior belongs to Epic 2.

### API Contract Guardrails

- `docs/api/openapi.yaml` is the API source of truth; regenerate `packages/types/src/api-types.ts` after contract edits and never hand-edit generated types.
- New route modules must be registered from `apps/server/src/index.ts` with ESM/NodeNext-compatible `.js` import specifiers.
- Protected Library/Home routes must use `authGuard` and `req.user!.id`, following the ownership discipline from Story 1.3 SSE review fixes.
- Standard error responses must use `reply.sendError` from `apps/server/src/plugins/error-envelope.ts`.
- Home input parsing should be deterministic and conservative:
  - XHS URLs/share text -> `type: "xhs_link"` with normalized first URL and optional multi-link warning data.
  - Trip text -> `type: "trip_params"` only when city and enough trip intent can be parsed locally.
  - Anything else -> `type: "unknown"` so the UI shows the disambiguation sheet.
- Do not introduce a new AI/router provider dependency in this story.

### Data and DTO Guardrails

- Library city aggregation must be user-scoped and must not leak other users' inspirations.
- Inspirations with `locateStatus="pending"` may have `LocateCandidate` snapshots. Candidate snapshots can include internal fields from Story 1.3 branch ranking, but the API/UI must sanitize them to name and address only.
- Do not expose or render confidence, score, distance, duration, rating, internal rank, raw provider ids, or raw Xiaohongshu media URLs.
- Media assets currently store `cosKey`; if a thumbnail is exposed, it must be a safe reference or URL generated by backend policy, never a hotlinked XHS URL.
- If `DATABASE_URL` is absent, keep local development/probes deterministic without crashing. Avoid broad mock data in production paths.

### UX Guardrails

- Home layout from UX: header with hamburger placeholder + top segmented control `计划 | 灵感`; destination cards; UnifiedInput in the footer; Library tab with city chips and sections.
- The unknown-input sheet must be bottom half-height and preserve context; it should not cover the destination cards/map grab area.
- Destination cards show city name plus count copy such as `N 个想去`; avoid a separate "found N inspirations" banner.
- Pending-location candidate sheet displays Top-5 name/address only.
- Selection basket supports "已选 N / 开始规划" and keeps state stable while switching between Home and Library.
- Use mobile-first dense product UI, not a landing page or marketing hero.
- No full map/Pick Sheet implementation in this story; that belongs to Story 2.0.

### Previous Story Intelligence

- Story 1.2 established Vite + React + TypeScript under `apps/mobile`, with `nomad-mobile` scripts `test`, `build`, and `typecheck`.
- Story 1.2 review found that analytics failures must never break UI flows and payloads must not contain PII. Keep Home analytics equally defensive.
- Story 1.2 review also found that labels/config should come from backend data where available with safe fallbacks; avoid hardcoding data that should come from Home/Library APIs.
- Story 1.3 review found cross-user SSE ownership and Prisma hydration issues. Apply that lesson to Library routes: every read must be scoped by authenticated user and existing DB rows should be read rather than reset or duplicated.
- Story 1.3 also established adapter seams and deterministic stubs. Reuse those patterns for no-DB Library tests rather than adding unrelated storage.
- Story 1.3 fixed external payload validation and candidate distance sanitization. Library must continue sanitizing output at the boundary even when internal snapshots contain richer data.

### Latest Technical Notes

- Use the repository-pinned frontend stack from `apps/mobile/package.json`: React 19.2.7, React DOM 19.2.7, Vite 8.0.16, Vitest 4.1.9, Testing Library React 16.3.2, and jsdom 29.1.1.
- Use the repository-pinned backend stack from `apps/server/package.json`: Fastify 5.8.5, Zod 3.23.8, Prisma Client 5.18.0, and TypeScript 5.4.5 for the server package.
- The WSL Node runtime has already satisfied the repo engines (`node >=20`). Do not upgrade framework versions as part of this story.

### Completion Notes List

- Ultimate context engine analysis completed - comprehensive developer guide created.
- Added deterministic authenticated `POST /home/input/parse` for XHS, trip-params, and unknown Home input routing without adding an LLM dependency.
- Added authenticated Library routes for city aggregation, inspiration lists, and sanitized Top-5 pending-location candidates.
- Extended the Story 1.3 ingest store with user-scoped Library read helpers for Prisma and deterministic no-DB probes.
- Implemented the mobile Home/Library surface after login, including destination cards, segmented Plan/Library views, UnifiedInput, unknown-input sheet, pending-location candidate sheet, selected basket, and typed Planner handoff.
- Extended privacy-safe analytics and CI coverage for mobile tests plus the Home/Library contract probe.
- Resolved all 15 code-review patch findings: Library filters/sections, actionable unknown choices, selected-basket planning, selected anchor source context, stricter parser/filter/candidate boundaries, App session restore, candidate race protection, and fixed textarea resizing.
